text: The next generation 5G cellular wireless systems are expected to deliver higher data rates, better end user quality-of-experience (QoE), lower end-to-end latency and overall lower energy consumption. A number of emerging technologies are expected to form the basis of the new 5G mobile communications standards and these are identified. The challenges these technologies present and the measurement and test challenges associated with 5G systems are also discussed.
explanation: The text uses generic, textbook-like phrasing with no distinctive markers. It could plausibly be authored by either a human or an AI.
